name: Medical Prescription
description: Extract patient, doctor, and medication details from prescriptions.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- patient_full_name (string)
- patient_date_of_birth (date)
- doctor_full_name (string)
- doctor_license_number (string)
- clinic_or_hospital_name (string)
- prescription_date (date)
- validity_date (date)
- diagnosis_code (string)
- notes (string)
- medications (array): each item has name, dosage, form (tablet/capsule/etc.), frequency, duration, quantity

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
